title: Create a box primitive
description: Create a Part::Box with specified dimensions.
code:
box = doc.addObject("Part::Box", "Box")
box.Length = 10
box.Width = 20
box.Height = 30
doc.recompute()

title: Create a cylinder primitive
description: Create a Part::Cylinder with radius and height.
code:
cyl = doc.addObject("Part::Cylinder", "Cylinder")
cyl.Radius = 5
cyl.Height = 20
doc.recompute()

title: Create a sphere primitive
description: Create a Part::Sphere with a given radius.
code:
sphere = doc.addObject("Part::Sphere", "Sphere")
sphere.Radius = 10
doc.recompute()

title: Create a cone primitive
description: Create a Part::Cone with two radii and height.
code:
cone = doc.addObject("Part::Cone", "Cone")
cone.Radius1 = 10
cone.Radius2 = 5
cone.Height = 15
doc.recompute()

title: Create a torus primitive
description: Create a Part::Torus with major and minor radii.
code:
torus = doc.addObject("Part::Torus", "Torus")
torus.Radius1 = 10
torus.Radius2 = 3
doc.recompute()

title: Boolean cut (subtract)
description: Subtract one shape from another using Part::Cut.
code:
cut = doc.addObject("Part::Cut", "Cut")
cut.Base = doc.getObject("Box")
cut.Tool = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
doc.recompute()

title: Boolean fuse (union)
description: Combine two shapes using Part::Fuse.
code:
fuse = doc.addObject("Part::Fuse", "Fuse")
fuse.Base = doc.getObject("Box")
fuse.Tool = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
doc.recompute()

title: Boolean common (intersection)
description: Get the intersection of two shapes using Part::Common.
code:
common = doc.addObject("Part::Common", "Common")
common.Base = doc.getObject("Box")
common.Tool = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
doc.recompute()

title: Multi-fuse (union of many shapes)
description: Fuse multiple shapes at once using Part::MultiFuse.
code:
mf = doc.addObject("Part::MultiFuse", "MultiFuse")
mf.Shapes = [doc.getObject("Box"), doc.getObject("Cylinder"), doc.getObject("Sphere")]
doc.recompute()

title: Multi-cut (subtract many shapes)
description: Cut multiple tools from a base shape using Part::MultiCommon or iterative cuts.
code:
cut1 = doc.addObject("Part::Cut", "Cut1")
cut1.Base = doc.getObject("Box")
cut1.Tool = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
cut2 = doc.addObject("Part::Cut", "Cut2")
cut2.Base = cut1
cut2.Tool = doc.getObject("Sphere")
doc.recompute()

title: Set object placement (position and rotation)
description: Position an object using FreeCAD.Placement with translation and rotation.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.Placement = FreeCAD.Placement(
    FreeCAD.Vector(10, 20, 30),
    FreeCAD.Rotation(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 45)
)

title: Move object by offset
description: Translate an object by a vector offset.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.Placement.Base = obj.Placement.Base + FreeCAD.Vector(10, 0, 0)

title: PartDesign body with padded sketch
description: Create a PartDesign Body, add a sketch on XY plane, draw a rectangle, and pad it.
code:
body = doc.addObject("PartDesign::Body", "Body")
sketch = body.newObject("Sketcher::SketchObject", "Sketch")
sketch.AttachmentSupport = [(body.Origin.OriginFeatures[3], "")]
sketch.MapMode = "FlatFace"

# Rectangle corners
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 10, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(20, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 10, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0)))

# Constrain corners
for i in range(4):
    sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Coincident", i, 2, (i+1) % 4, 1))

pad = body.newObject("PartDesign::Pad", "Pad")
pad.Profile = sketch
pad.Length = 15
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign pocket (cut into body)
description: Add a pocket to an existing PartDesign body by sketching on a face.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
sketch = body.newObject("Sketcher::SketchObject", "PocketSketch")
sketch.AttachmentSupport = [(doc.getObject("Pad"), "Face6")]
sketch.MapMode = "FlatFace"

# Circle for pocket
sketch.addGeometry(Part.Circle(FreeCAD.Vector(10, 5, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 3))

pocket = body.newObject("PartDesign::Pocket", "Pocket")
pocket.Profile = sketch
pocket.Length = 5
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign revolution
description: Revolve a sketch profile around an axis to create a solid of revolution.
code:
body = doc.addObject("PartDesign::Body", "Body")
sketch = body.newObject("Sketcher::SketchObject", "Sketch")
sketch.AttachmentSupport = [(body.Origin.OriginFeatures[3], "")]
sketch.MapMode = "FlatFace"

# Half-circle profile for revolution
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(5, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(10, 0, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.ArcOfCircle(Part.Circle(FreeCAD.Vector(7.5, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 2.5), 0, 3.14159))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(5, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(5, 0, 0)))

rev = body.newObject("PartDesign::Revolution", "Revolution")
rev.Profile = sketch
rev.Axis = (sketch, ["N_Axis"])
rev.Angle = 360
doc.recompute()

title: Sketcher line segment
description: Add a line segment to a sketch.
code:
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(10, 0, 0)
))

title: Sketcher circle
description: Add a circle to a sketch.
code:
sketch.addGeometry(Part.Circle(
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1),
    5
))

title: Sketcher arc
description: Add an arc of circle to a sketch.
code:
import math
sketch.addGeometry(Part.ArcOfCircle(
    Part.Circle(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 5),
    0, math.pi / 2
))

title: Sketcher constraint: fixed distance
description: Constrain a line length in a sketch.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Distance", 0, 20.0))

title: Sketcher constraint: horizontal and vertical
description: Make sketch lines horizontal or vertical.
code:
sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Horizontal", 0))
sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Vertical", 1))

title: Sketcher constraint: coincident points
description: Constrain two points to be at the same location.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Coincident", 0, 2, 1, 1))

title: Sketcher constraint: equal length
description: Make two edges equal in length.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Equal", 0, 2))

title: Sketcher constraint: symmetric
description: Make geometry symmetric about a line.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Symmetric", 0, 1, 1, 1, 2, 1))

title: Part fillet on edges
description: Apply a fillet to selected edges of a Part shape.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
fillet = doc.addObject("Part::Fillet", "Fillet")
fillet.Base = obj
fillet.Shape = obj.Shape.makeFillet(2.0, obj.Shape.Edges)
doc.recompute()

title: Part chamfer on edges
description: Apply a chamfer to edges of a Part shape.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
chamfer = doc.addObject("Part::Chamfer", "Chamfer")
chamfer.Base = obj
chamfer.Shape = obj.Shape.makeChamfer(2.0, obj.Shape.Edges)
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign fillet
description: Fillet edges in a PartDesign body workflow.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
fillet = body.newObject("PartDesign::Fillet", "Fillet")
fillet.Base = (doc.getObject("Pad"), ["Edge1", "Edge2"])
fillet.Radius = 2.0
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign chamfer
description: Chamfer edges in a PartDesign body workflow.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
chamfer = body.newObject("PartDesign::Chamfer", "Chamfer")
chamfer.Base = (doc.getObject("Pad"), ["Edge1"])
chamfer.Size = 2.0
doc.recompute()

title: Draft wire (polyline)
description: Create a Draft wire from a list of points.
code:
points = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(10, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(10, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 10, 0)]
wire = Draft.make_wire(points, closed=True)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft circle
description: Create a Draft circle with a given radius.
code:
circle = Draft.make_circle(10)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft rectangle
description: Create a Draft rectangle.
code:
rect = Draft.make_rectangle(20, 10)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft polygon
description: Create a regular polygon with Draft.
code:
polygon = Draft.make_polygon(6, radius=10)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft text annotation
description: Add a text annotation in Draft.
code:
text = Draft.make_text(["Hello", "World"], FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0))
doc.recompute()

title: Draft array (rectangular)
description: Create a rectangular array of an object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
array = Draft.make_ortho_array(obj, FreeCAD.Vector(15, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 15, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), 3, 2, 1)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft polar array
description: Create a polar (circular) array of an object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
array = Draft.make_polar_array(obj, 6, 360, FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1))
doc.recompute()

title: Draft mirror
description: Mirror an object across a plane.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
mirror = Draft.mirror(obj, FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(1, 0, 0))
doc.recompute()

title: Part extrude a wire
description: Extrude a 2D wire into a 3D solid.
code:
wire = doc.getObject("Wire")
extrude = doc.addObject("Part::Extrusion", "Extrude")
extrude.Base = wire
extrude.Dir = FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 10)
extrude.Solid = True
doc.recompute()

title: Create shape from Part.makeBox
description: Directly create a shape using Part API and add to document.
code:
shape = Part.makeBox(10, 20, 30)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "MyBox")
obj.Shape = shape
doc.recompute()

title: Create a pipe/sweep along a path
description: Sweep a profile along a path using Part::Sweep.
code:
sweep = doc.addObject("Part::Sweep", "Sweep")
sweep.Sections = [doc.getObject("Circle")]
sweep.Spine = (doc.getObject("Wire"), ["Edge1"])
sweep.Solid = True
doc.recompute()

title: Create a loft between profiles
description: Loft between two or more wire profiles.
code:
loft = doc.addObject("Part::Loft", "Loft")
loft.Sections = [doc.getObject("Wire1"), doc.getObject("Wire2")]
loft.Solid = True
doc.recompute()

title: Working with selection
description: Get selected objects and sub-elements from the FreeCAD GUI.

title: Create a new document
description: Create a new FreeCAD document.
code:
new_doc = FreeCAD.newDocument("MyDocument")
FreeCAD.setActiveDocument(new_doc.Name)

title: Export to STEP file
description: Export objects to a STEP file.
code:
import Part
objs = [doc.getObject("Body")]
Part.export(objs, "/tmp/export.step")

title: Export to STL file
description: Export a mesh or shape to STL for 3D printing.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Body")
obj.Shape.exportStl("/tmp/export.stl")

title: Create a compound of shapes
description: Group multiple shapes into a Part::Compound.
code:
compound = doc.addObject("Part::Compound", "Compound")
compound.Links = [doc.getObject("Box"), doc.getObject("Cylinder")]
doc.recompute()

title: Sketch on XZ plane
description: Attach a sketch to the XZ plane in a PartDesign body.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
sketch = body.newObject("Sketcher::SketchObject", "SketchXZ")
sketch.AttachmentSupport = [(body.Origin.OriginFeatures[4], "")]
sketch.MapMode = "FlatFace"
doc.recompute()

title: Sketch on YZ plane
description: Attach a sketch to the YZ plane in a PartDesign body.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
sketch = body.newObject("Sketcher::SketchObject", "SketchYZ")
sketch.AttachmentSupport = [(body.Origin.OriginFeatures[5], "")]
sketch.MapMode = "FlatFace"
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign linear pattern
description: Create a linear pattern of a feature in PartDesign.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
pattern = body.newObject("PartDesign::LinearPattern", "LinearPattern")
pattern.Originals = [doc.getObject("Pad")]
pattern.Direction = (doc.getObject("Sketch"), ["N_Axis"])
pattern.Length = 50
pattern.Occurrences = 5
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign polar pattern
description: Create a polar pattern of a feature in PartDesign.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
pattern = body.newObject("PartDesign::PolarPattern", "PolarPattern")
pattern.Originals = [doc.getObject("Pocket")]
pattern.Axis = (doc.getObject("Sketch"), ["N_Axis"])
pattern.Angle = 360
pattern.Occurrences = 6
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign mirrored feature
description: Mirror a feature across a plane in PartDesign.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
mirror = body.newObject("PartDesign::Mirrored", "Mirrored")
mirror.Originals = [doc.getObject("Pad")]
mirror.MirrorPlane = (doc.getObject("Sketch"), ["V_Axis"])
doc.recompute()

title: Create a Part::Wedge
description: Create a wedge shape (truncated pyramid).
code:
wedge = doc.addObject("Part::Wedge", "Wedge")
wedge.Xmin = 0
wedge.Xmax = 10
wedge.Ymin = 0
wedge.Ymax = 10
wedge.Zmin = 0
wedge.Zmax = 10
wedge.X2min = 2
wedge.X2max = 8
wedge.Z2min = 2
wedge.Z2max = 8
doc.recompute()

title: Create a helix shape
description: Create a helix wire using Part.makeHelix for springs or threads.
code:
helix = Part.makeHelix(5, 40, 10)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "Helix")
obj.Shape = helix
doc.recompute()

title: Create a Part::Prism
description: Create a regular prism (e.g., hexagonal) using Part::Prism.
code:
prism = doc.addObject("Part::Prism", "Prism")
prism.Polygon = 6
prism.Circumradius = 10
prism.Height = 20
doc.recompute()

title: Shell a solid (hollow out)
description: Create a hollow shell from a solid shape using Part.makeShell or Part::Thickness.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
thickness = doc.addObject("Part::Thickness", "Shell")
thickness.Value = -1
thickness.Join = 0
thickness.Faces = (obj, ["Face6"])
doc.recompute()

title: Offset a 2D shape
description: Create a 2D offset of a wire shape using Part.makeOffset2D.
code:
wire = doc.getObject("Wire")
offset_shape = wire.Shape.makeOffset2D(2.0)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "Offset")
obj.Shape = offset_shape
doc.recompute()

title: Create a BSpline curve
description: Create a B-Spline curve through control points.
code:
pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(5, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(15, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0)]
bspline = Part.BSplineCurve()
bspline.interpolate(pts)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "BSpline")
obj.Shape = bspline.toShape()
doc.recompute()

title: Section (slice) a shape with a plane
description: Slice a solid shape with a plane to produce a cross-section wire.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
plane = Part.Plane(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 5), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1))
section = obj.Shape.section(plane.toShape())
result = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "Section")
result.Shape = section
doc.recompute()

title: Mesh from shape for 3D printing
description: Convert a Part shape to a Mesh object.
code:
import MeshPart
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
mesh_data = MeshPart.meshFromShape(Shape=obj.Shape, LinearDeflection=0.1, AngularDeflection=0.5)
mesh_obj = doc.addObject("Mesh::Feature", "Mesh")
mesh_obj.Mesh = mesh_data
doc.recompute()

title: Import a STEP file
description: Import geometry from a STEP file into the active document.
code:
import Part
Part.insert("/path/to/file.step", doc.Name)
doc.recompute()

title: Import an STL mesh
description: Import an STL mesh file into the active document.
code:
import Mesh
Mesh.insert("/path/to/file.stl", doc.Name)
doc.recompute()

title: Set object color and transparency
description: Change the display color and transparency of an object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.ViewObject.ShapeColor = (1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
obj.ViewObject.Transparency = 50

title: Set line width and point size
description: Change the display line width and point size of an object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Wire")
obj.ViewObject.LineWidth = 3.0
obj.ViewObject.PointSize = 5.0
obj.ViewObject.LineColor = (0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 0.0)

title: Hide and show objects
description: Toggle object visibility in the 3D view.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.ViewObject.Visibility = False

obj2 = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
obj2.ViewObject.Visibility = True

title: Get shape measurements (volume, area, center of mass)
description: Query geometric properties of a shape.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
shape = obj.Shape
print(f"Volume: {shape.Volume}")
print(f"Surface area: {shape.Area}")
print(f"Center of mass: {shape.CenterOfMass}")
print(f"Bounding box: {shape.BoundBox}")

title: Measure distance between two shapes
description: Compute the minimum distance between two shapes.
code:
obj1 = doc.getObject("Box")
obj2 = doc.getObject("Cylinder")
dist = obj1.Shape.distToShape(obj2.Shape)
print(f"Minimum distance: {dist[0]}")

title: List all edges and faces of a shape
description: Iterate over edges and faces for inspection or selection.

title: Sketcher B-spline
description: Add a B-spline curve to a sketch using control points.
code:
pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(5, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(15, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0)]
sketch.addGeometry(Part.BSplineCurve(pts, None, None, False, 3, None, False), False)

title: Sketcher ellipse
description: Add an ellipse to a sketch.
code:
sketch.addGeometry(Part.Ellipse(
    FreeCAD.Vector(10, 0, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 5, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0)
))

title: Sketcher constraint: fix point position
description: Lock a point to specific X, Y coordinates.
code:
sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("DistanceX", 0, 1, 10.0))
sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("DistanceY", 0, 1, 5.0))

title: Sketcher constraint: tangent
description: Make two curves tangent to each other.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Tangent", 0, 1))

title: Sketcher constraint: perpendicular
description: Make two lines perpendicular to each other.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Perpendicular", 0, 1))

title: Sketcher constraint: parallel
description: Make two lines parallel.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Parallel", 0, 1))

title: Sketcher constraint: radius
description: Set the radius of a circle or arc in a sketch.
code: sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Radius", 0, 5.0))

title: Sketcher constraint: angle between lines
description: Constrain the angle between two lines.
code:
import math
sketch.addConstraint(Sketcher.Constraint("Angle", 0, 1, math.radians(45)))

title: Sketcher external geometry reference
description: Add an external edge reference to a sketch for constraining against.
code: sketch.addExternal("Pad", "Edge1")

title: Sketcher construction geometry
description: Toggle geometry to construction mode (used for constraints, not solid).
code:
idx = sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0)
))
sketch.toggleConstruction(idx)

title: Sketcher slot (rounded rectangle)
description: Create a slot shape (two semicircles connected by lines) in a sketch.
code:
import math
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 3, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 3, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.LineSegment(FreeCAD.Vector(0, -3, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, -3, 0)))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.ArcOfCircle(Part.Circle(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 3), math.pi/2, 3*math.pi/2))
sketch.addGeometry(Part.ArcOfCircle(Part.Circle(FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), 3), -math.pi/2, math.pi/2))

title: PartDesign additive pipe (sweep along sketch)
description: Create a PartDesign AdditivePipe by sweeping a profile along a path.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
pipe = body.newObject("PartDesign::AdditivePipe", "AdditivePipe")
pipe.Profile = doc.getObject("ProfileSketch")
pipe.Spine = (doc.getObject("PathSketch"), ["Edge1"])
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign additive loft
description: Create a PartDesign AdditiveLoft between two or more sketches.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
loft = body.newObject("PartDesign::AdditiveLoft", "AdditiveLoft")
loft.Profile = doc.getObject("Sketch1")
loft.Sections = [doc.getObject("Sketch2")]
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign hole feature
description: Create a standard hole (counterbore, countersink, or through) in PartDesign.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
hole = body.newObject("PartDesign::Hole", "Hole")
hole.Profile = doc.getObject("HoleSketch")
hole.Threaded = False
hole.Diameter = 5.0
hole.Depth = 10.0
hole.DepthType = 0
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign thickness (shell a body)
description: Hollow out a PartDesign body using Thickness feature.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
thick = body.newObject("PartDesign::Thickness", "Thickness")
thick.Base = (doc.getObject("Pad"), ["Face6"])
thick.Value = 1.0
thick.Join = 0
doc.recompute()

title: PartDesign datum plane
description: Create an offset datum plane for sketching at an arbitrary location.
code:
body = doc.getObject("Body")
datum = body.newObject("PartDesign::Plane", "DatumPlane")
datum.AttachmentSupport = [(body.Origin.OriginFeatures[3], "")]
datum.MapMode = "FlatFace"
datum.AttachmentOffset = FreeCAD.Placement(FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 25), FreeCAD.Rotation())
doc.recompute()

title: Draft dimension annotation
description: Add a linear dimension annotation between two points.
code:
dim = Draft.make_linear_dimension(
    FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0),
    FreeCAD.Vector(10, 5, 0)
)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft BSpline curve
description: Create a Draft B-Spline through points.
code:
points = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(5, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(15, 10, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(20, 0, 0)]
bspline = Draft.make_bspline(points)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft ellipse
description: Create a Draft ellipse with major and minor radii.
code:
ellipse = Draft.make_ellipse(15, 10)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft point
description: Create a Draft point object at a location.
code:
point = Draft.make_point(10, 20, 0)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft clone
description: Create a clone of an existing object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
clone = Draft.clone(obj)
clone.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(30, 0, 0)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft upgrade (join wires to face)
description: Upgrade Draft objects (e.g., join wires into a face).
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Wire")
result = Draft.upgrade([obj])
doc.recompute()

title: Draft downgrade (explode compound)
description: Downgrade Draft objects (e.g., explode compound into individual shapes).
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Compound")
result = Draft.downgrade([obj])
doc.recompute()

title: Draft scale an object
description: Scale an object by a factor using Draft.scale.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
scaled = Draft.scale(obj, FreeCAD.Vector(2, 2, 2), center=FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), copy=True)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft rotate an object
description: Rotate an object using Draft.rotate.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
Draft.rotate(obj, 45, center=FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), axis=FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 1), copy=False)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft move an object
description: Move an object using Draft.move.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
Draft.move(obj, FreeCAD.Vector(10, 20, 0), copy=False)
doc.recompute()

title: Draft path array
description: Array objects along a path curve.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
path = doc.getObject("Wire")
array = Draft.make_path_array(obj, path, 5)
doc.recompute()

title: Rotate object around arbitrary axis
description: Rotate an object around an arbitrary axis through a point.
code:
import math
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
axis = FreeCAD.Vector(1, 1, 0).normalize()
center = FreeCAD.Vector(5, 5, 0)
rot = FreeCAD.Rotation(axis, 30)
obj.Placement = FreeCAD.Placement(center, rot, -center).multiply(obj.Placement)

title: Copy an object
description: Create an independent copy of an object in the document.
code:
import Part as PartMod
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
new_obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "BoxCopy")
new_obj.Shape = obj.Shape.copy()
new_obj.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(30, 0, 0)
doc.recompute()

title: Group objects in a folder
description: Organize objects by placing them in a document group.
code:
group = doc.addObject("App::DocumentObjectGroup", "MyGroup")
group.addObject(doc.getObject("Box"))
group.addObject(doc.getObject("Cylinder"))

title: Add custom properties to an object
description: Attach custom properties (parameters) to any document object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.addProperty("App::PropertyFloat", "MyParam", "Custom", "A custom parameter")
obj.MyParam = 42.0
obj.addProperty("App::PropertyString", "Note", "Custom", "A note")
obj.Note = "Created by AI"

title: Rename an object label
description: Change the human-readable label of an object.
code:
obj = doc.getObject("Box")
obj.Label = "Main Housing"

title: Save document to file
description: Save the active document to a FreeCAD file.
code: doc.saveAs("/tmp/myproject.FCStd")

title: Set camera view
description: Set the 3D view to a standard orientation and fit all objects.
code:
FreeCADGui.activeDocument().activeView().viewIsometric()
FreeCADGui.SendMsgToActiveView("ViewFit")

title: Set specific camera orientations
description: Set the 3D view to front, top, right, or other standard views.
code:
view = FreeCADGui.activeDocument().activeView()
view.viewFront()
# Other options: viewTop(), viewRight(), viewRear(), viewBottom(), viewLeft()

title: Select objects programmatically
description: Add objects to the selection from code.
code:
FreeCADGui.Selection.clearSelection()
FreeCADGui.Selection.addSelection(doc.getObject("Box"))
FreeCADGui.Selection.addSelection(doc.getObject("Cylinder"), "Face1")

title: Iterate all objects in document
description: Loop over all objects in the active document and print their info.
code:
for obj in doc.Objects:
    print(f"{obj.Name} ({obj.TypeId}): Label={obj.Label}")

title: Delete an object
description: Remove an object from the document.
code:
doc.removeObject("Box")
doc.recompute()

title: Create a pipe with circular cross-section
description: Create a hollow pipe by sweeping a circular wire along a path.
code:
import math
# Create path
path_pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 50)]
path = Draft.make_wire(path_pts)

# Create outer and inner circles
outer = Draft.make_circle(10)
inner = Draft.make_circle(8)

# Extrude both and subtract
outer_ext = doc.addObject("Part::Extrusion", "OuterPipe")
outer_ext.Base = outer
outer_ext.Dir = FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 50)
outer_ext.Solid = True

inner_ext = doc.addObject("Part::Extrusion", "InnerPipe")
inner_ext.Base = inner
inner_ext.Dir = FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 50)
inner_ext.Solid = True

pipe = doc.addObject("Part::Cut", "Pipe")
pipe.Base = outer_ext
pipe.Tool = inner_ext
doc.recompute()

title: Create a plate with holes
description: Create a flat plate with an array of mounting holes.
code:
# Base plate
plate = doc.addObject("Part::Box", "Plate")
plate.Length = 100
plate.Width = 60
plate.Height = 5

# Create holes by cutting cylinders
base = plate
for i, (x, y) in enumerate([(10, 10), (90, 10), (10, 50), (90, 50)]):
    hole = doc.addObject("Part::Cylinder", f"Hole{i}")
    hole.Radius = 3
    hole.Height = 10
    hole.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(x, y, -1)
    cut = doc.addObject("Part::Cut", f"Cut{i}")
    cut.Base = base
    cut.Tool = hole
    base = cut

doc.recompute()

title: Create an L-bracket
description: Create an L-shaped bracket from two boxes fused together.
code:
vert = doc.addObject("Part::Box", "Vertical")
vert.Length = 30
vert.Width = 5
vert.Height = 40

horiz = doc.addObject("Part::Box", "Horizontal")
horiz.Length = 30
horiz.Width = 40
horiz.Height = 5

bracket = doc.addObject("Part::Fuse", "LBracket")
bracket.Base = vert
bracket.Tool = horiz
doc.recompute()

title: Export to IGES file
description: Export objects to an IGES file format.
code:
import Part
objs = [doc.getObject("Body")]
Part.export(objs, "/tmp/export.iges")

title: Create a Part::RegularPolygon wire
description: Create a regular polygon wire using Part API.
code:
import math
n_sides = 8
radius = 10
pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(radius * math.cos(2 * math.pi * i / n_sides),
                      radius * math.sin(2 * math.pi * i / n_sides), 0)
       for i in range(n_sides)]
pts.append(pts[0])
wire = Part.makePolygon(pts)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "Octagon")
obj.Shape = wire
doc.recompute()

title: Create a thread (helical sweep)
description: Create a simple thread by sweeping a triangle along a helix.
code:
import math

# Helix path
helix = Part.makeHelix(2, 20, 5)

# Triangle profile at helix start
p0 = FreeCAD.Vector(5, 0, 0)
p1 = FreeCAD.Vector(6, 0, 0)
p2 = FreeCAD.Vector(5, 0, 1)
tri = Part.makePolygon([p0, p1, p2, p0])
face = Part.Face(Part.Wire(tri))

# Sweep
thread = Part.Wire(helix).makePipeShell([face.OuterWire], True, True)
obj = doc.addObject("Part::Feature", "Thread")
obj.Shape = thread
doc.recompute()

title: Mesh Boolean operations
description: Perform Boolean operations on Mesh objects.
code:
import Mesh
m1 = doc.getObject("Mesh1").Mesh
m2 = doc.getObject("Mesh2").Mesh

# Union
union_mesh = Mesh.Mesh(m1)
union_mesh.unite(m2)
result = doc.addObject("Mesh::Feature", "MeshUnion")
result.Mesh = union_mesh
doc.recompute()

title: Undo and redo operations
description: Undo or redo the last operation on the document.
code:
doc.undo()
# To redo:
# doc.redo()

title: Create an Arch Wall
description: Create an architectural wall with specified dimensions.
code:
import Arch
wall = Arch.makeWall(None, length=4000, width=200, height=3000, name="Wall")
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Wall from a line
description: Create a wall by extruding a Draft line (baseline) to a wall.
code:
import Arch
baseline = Draft.make_wire([FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(4000, 0, 0)])
wall = Arch.makeWall(baseline, width=200, height=3000, name="Wall")
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Window
description: Create a window in a wall using the Arch workbench.
code:
import Arch
wall = doc.getObject("Wall")
window = Arch.makeWindowPreset("Open 2-pane", width=1200, height=1000, h1=100, h2=100, h3=100, w1=200, w2=100, o1=0, o2=100)
window.Hosts = [wall]
window.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(1000, 0, 800)
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Door
description: Create a door opening in a wall.
code:
import Arch
wall = doc.getObject("Wall")
door = Arch.makeWindowPreset("Simple door", width=900, height=2100, h1=100, h2=100, h3=100, w1=200, w2=100, o1=0, o2=100)
door.Hosts = [wall]
door.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(2000, 0, 0)
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Structure (column or beam)
description: Create a structural element like a column or beam.
code:
import Arch
# Column
column = Arch.makeStructure(None, length=300, width=300, height=3000, name="Column")
column.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0)

# Beam
beam = Arch.makeStructure(None, length=4000, width=200, height=300, name="Beam")
beam.Placement.Base = FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 3000)
beam.Role = "Beam"
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Floor (BuildingPart)
description: Create a floor/storey to organize building elements.
code:
import Arch
floor = Arch.makeFloor([doc.getObject("Wall")])
floor.Label = "Ground Floor"
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Building
description: Create a building container for floors and elements.
code:
import Arch
building = Arch.makeBuilding([doc.getObject("Floor")])
building.Label = "My Building"
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Site
description: Create a site container for buildings.
code:
import Arch
site = Arch.makeSite([doc.getObject("Building")])
site.Label = "My Site"
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Roof
description: Create a roof from a wire outline.
code:
import Arch
# Outline of the roof footprint
pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 3000), FreeCAD.Vector(5000, 0, 3000),
       FreeCAD.Vector(5000, 4000, 3000), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 4000, 3000)]
wire = Draft.make_wire(pts, closed=True)
roof = Arch.makeRoof(wire, angles=[45, 45, 45, 45])
doc.recompute()

title: Create an Arch Slab (floor slab)
description: Create a concrete floor slab from a wire outline.
code:
import Arch
pts = [FreeCAD.Vector(0, 0, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(5000, 0, 0),
       FreeCAD.Vector(5000, 4000, 0), FreeCAD.Vector(0, 4000, 0)]
wire = Draft.make_wire(pts, closed=True)
slab = Arch.makeStructure(wire, height=200)
slab.Role = "Slab"
slab.Label = "FloorSlab"
doc.recompute()

title: Create Arch Stairs
description: Create a staircase with specified parameters.
code:
import Arch
stairs = Arch.makeStairs(None, length=3000, width=1000, height=3000, steps=15)
stairs.Label = "Stairs"
doc.recompute()

title: Export to IFC (BIM exchange format)
description: Export the model to IFC format for BIM interoperability.
code:
import importIFC
importIFC.export([doc.getObject("Site")], "/tmp/model.ifc")
